Pending Experience Candidates

AI-generated wiki drafts waiting for review. Stable kb/ files are unchanged until promotion.

7

  1. Agents Can Mislead Users If Failures Are Reported As Successful Outcomes

    * When an operation, delegation, or guard fails or returns uncertain status, fail closed and state the failure honestly instead of claiming success. * Do not pretend success when the underlying work failed or was not verified. * **Use this page when:** You are implementing age...

    Target
    kb/known-fixes/agents-can-mislead-users-if-failures-are-reported-as-successful-outcomes.md
    Kind
    known_fix
    Scope
    personal
    Source
    stable_kb:kb/known-fixes/agents-can-mislead-users-if-failures-are-reported-as-successful-outcomes.md
    Confidence
    0.65

  2. Missing Replay Data Compromises The Ability To Debug Or Verify Past Execution

    In complex system testing, particularly post-deployment, replay data is essential for ensuring that the system behaves as expected under load or specific conditions. When this data is missing, the integrity of the stability check is compromised, leaving certain execution paths...

    Target
    kb/known-fixes/missing-replay-data-compromises-the-ability-to-debug-or-verify-past-execution.md
    Kind
    known_fix
    Scope
    personal
    Source

    Confidence
    0.65

  3. Openclaw Slack Replay And Post Deploy Stability Failures

    Post-deploy stability runs often encounter two distinct failure modes that can mask the true health of the system: * **Live Slack Failures:** Runtime bugs causing mismatches in replay footprints (missing native announce footers, delivery transport mismatches, child session spa...

    Target

  4. Post Deploy Stability Smoke Test Run Openclaw Resulted In An Overall Failure

    The 'openclaw' stability smoke test run failed, triggered by critical runtime issues in the live Slack integration tests. While the 'synthetic_fixtures' lane passed successfully, the 'slack_delivery' lane encountered errors. Additionally, multiple nightly replay lanes could no...

  5. Changes Can Introduce Regressions When Not Tested After Modification

    Changes are a constant in system development and maintenance. However, even minor adjustments can have unintended side effects on existing functionality. Assuming a change is successful based solely on successful implementation, without validating system behavior, often leads ...

    Target
    kb/pitfalls/changes-can-introduce-regressions-when-not-tested-after-modification.md

    Scope

  6. Actions On The Wrong Target Machine Or Host Can Cause Unsafe Operational Changes

    Operational actions often involve destructive or disruptive changes such as restarts or configuration mutations. Performing these actions on the wrong target machine can lead to service outages, data loss, or unsafe operational states. Verification of the target identity is a ...

    Target
    kb/procedures/actions-on-the-wrong-target-machine-or-host-can-cause-unsafe-operational-changes.md
    Kind
    procedure
    Scope

    0.65

  7. Case Sensitive Database Comparisons Can Miss Logically Equivalent Values

    By default, many database systems perform case-sensitive string comparisons. This behavior can lead to logical errors where `Value` and `value` are treated as distinct entities. If the application logic treats them as the same, this discrepancy can cause data duplication, fail...

    Target
    kb/procedures/case-sensitive-database-comparisons-can-miss-logically-equivalent-values.md
